design_note: Generated from Admin Services FR specification. Each endpoint has at least 30 executable test-case definitions for local runner execution and review. Some scenarios require seeded fixtures or manual verification hooks.

test_cases.test_description: Probe whether business-logic accepts lowercase "active" (case-insensitive compare or normalisation).
test_cases.expected_result: 200/201 if BL is case-insensitive or normalises (Active/active accepted); 400 if BL requires exact UPPERCASE.

test_cases.test_description: Reject malformed status value (typo) that is not in the BL allowed set ACTIVE/INACTIVE.
test_cases.expected_result: 400 Bad Request; status not in allowed set [ACTIVE, INACTIVE].
